response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of software development experience but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese, embedded networking/LAN-switch experience, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), Linux kernel modification experience, and current C programming proficiency. C/C++ work is limited to a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago. The profile is a web/full-stack developer, not an embedded firmware/security engineer.
strengths: 10+ years of broad software development experience across multiple stacks
Strong testing and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and Linux familiarity
concerns: No evidence of Japanese language proficiency (required at native level)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF) experience
No Linux kernel investigation/modification experience and only dated C work

key_factors.factor: Missing embedded networking and security domain expertise
Insufficient and outdated C/UNIX and Linux kernel experience
